allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./public/curia/events.json''\); console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(d\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\(''has events:'', Array.isArray\(d.events\)\); if\(Array.isArray\(d.events\)\) console.log\(''count:'', d.events.length, ''first:'', JSON.stringify\(d.events[0]\).slice\(0,200\)\); else if\(Array.isArray\(d\)\) console.log\(''is array, count:'', d.length, ''first:'', JSON.stringify\(d[0]\).slice\(0,200\)\);")
